heading: Conditions
label: 1522 Conditions
notes: Amendments1984—Subsec. (a). amended subsec. (a) generally, substituting provisions setting forth different levels of maximum grant amounts in cases of Indians and Indian tribes for provisions providing a maximum of $50,000 in cases of both Indians and Indian tribes.Pub. L. 98–449
amendments: Amendments1984—Subsec. (a). amended subsec. (a) generally, substituting provisions setting forth different levels of maximum grant amounts in cases of Indians and Indian tribes for provisions providing a maximum of $50,000 in cases of both Indians and Indian tribes.Pub. L. 98–449

children.heading: Limitation of amount
children.label: a Limitation of amount
children.text: No grant in excess of $100,000 in the case of an Indian and $250,000 in the case of an Indian tribe, or such lower amount as the Secretary may determine to be appropriate, may be made under this subchapter.

children.heading: Financing from other sources; inability to obtain funds; applicant’s financial resources
children.label: b Financing from other sources; inability to obtain funds; applicant’s financial resources
children.text: A grant may be made only to an applicant who, in the opinion of the Secretary, is unable to obtain adequate financing for its economic enterprise from other sources: , That prior to making any grant under this subchapter, the Secretary shall assure that, where practical, the applicant has reasonably made available for the economic enterprise funds from the applicant’s own financial resources.Provided

children.heading: Percentage requirement
children.label: c Percentage requirement
children.text: No grant may be made to an applicant who is unable to obtain at least 60 per centum of the necessary funds for the economic enterprise from other sources.
